channel.title: Vpn on goshSAMit
channel.description: Recent content in Vpn on goshSAMit

item.title: Basic Tailscale Setup
item.description: My Problem I set up my home lab with three VLANs. My main VLAN, where all of our personal devices connect, a VLAN for smart devices to keep them separated from our personal network, and a VLAN for homelabbing. I was looking for a way to connect to my homelab from my personal devices to do development work, without affecting my actual network. Initially, the plan was a traditional self-hosted VPN like Wireguard but it was going to require port forwarding and other firewall workarounds that I was just not comfortable with on my personal network.
